title: The Acquired Territories (Merger) Act, 1960
full_text: The Acquired Territories (Merger) Act, 1960 अर्जित राज्‍यक्षेत्र (विलयन) अधिनियम, 1960 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196064 Act Number: 64 Enactment Date: 1960-12-28 Act Year: 1960 Short Title: The Acquired Territories (Merger) Act, 1960 Hindi Title: अर्जित राज्‍यक्षेत्र (विलयन) अधिनियम, 1960 Long Title: An Act to provide for the merger into the States of Assam, Punjab and West Bengal of certain territories acquired in pursuance of the agreements entered into between the Governments of India and Pakistan and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 17-01-1961 Notification: 17th January, 1961, vide notification No. G.S.R. 74, dated 14th January, 1961, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Acquired Territories (Merger) Act, 1960 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Merger of acquired territories. Section 4. Amendment of the First Schedule to the Constitution. Section 5. Construction of references to existing constituencies. Section 6. Provisions as to sitting members. Section 7. Property and assets. Section 8. Appropriation of moneys for expenditure in acquired territories. Section 9. Extension of laws. Section 10. Power to name authorities for exercising statutory functions. Section 11. Power to remove difficulties. Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE.
